vllm.title: [Bugfix] Support 2D input shape in MoE layer
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The MoE layer current assumes 1D input shape, i.e., [num_tokens, hidden_size]. This PR enhances this to support both 1D and 2D ([batch_size, seq_len, hidden_size]) input shapes.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] MLPSpeculator: Use ParallelLMHead in tie_weights=False case.
vllm.author: tdoublep

vllm.title: [Bugfix] OpenVINOExecutor abstractmethod error
vllm.author: park12sj
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
TypeError: Can't instantiate abstract class TPUExecutor with abstract methods add_prompt_adapter, list_prompt_adapters, pin_prompt_adapter, remove_prompt_adapter
This is Simple PR to fix the abstractmethod error in OpenVINOExecutor.
